allow: PowerShell($cpu = Get-CimInstance Win32_Processor | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty Name; $ram = [math]::Round\(\(Get-CimInstance Win32_ComputerSystem\).TotalPhysicalMemory / 1GB, 1\); $gpus = \(Get-CimInstance Win32_VideoController | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.Name\) \($\([math]::Round\($_.AdapterRAM/1GB,1\)\) GB VRAM reported\)" }\) -join '; '; "CPU: $cpu"; "RAM: $ram GB"; "GPU\(s\): $gpus")

PowerShell(foreach \($tool in 'git','conda','mamba','node','npm','python','gh','code'\) { $cmd = Get-Command $tool -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($cmd\) { $ver = try { & $tool --version 2>$null | Select-Object -First 1 } catch { 'found' }; "$tool : $ver" } else { "$tool : NOT INSTALLED" } })

PowerShell(foreach \($tool in 'conda','mamba','node','npm'\) { $cmd = Get-Command $tool -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($cmd\) { "$tool : $\(\(& $tool --version 2>$null | Select-Object -First 1\)\)" } else { "$tool : not on PATH" } }; $mf = "$env:USERPROFILE\\miniforge3"; if \(Test-Path $mf\) { "miniforge3 dir: $mf exists" } else { "miniforge3 dir: not at default location" })

PowerShell($spots = @\("C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\node.exe", "$env:USERPROFILE\\miniforge3\\Scripts\\conda.exe", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\miniforge3\\Scripts\\conda.exe", "C:\\ProgramData\\miniforge3\\Scripts\\conda.exe", "$env:USERPROFILE\\AppData\\Local\\Programs\\miniforge3\\Scripts\\conda.exe", "$env:USERPROFILE\\anaconda3\\Scripts\\conda.exe", "$env:USERPROFILE\\miniconda3\\Scripts\\conda.exe"\); foreach \($s in $spots\) { if \(Test-Path $s\) { "FOUND: $s" } }; "--- user PATH \(registry\):"; \(Get-ItemProperty HKCU:\\Environment\).Path -split ';' | Where-Object { $_ -match 'conda|forge|node' }; "--- system PATH \(registry\):"; \(Get-ItemProperty 'HKLM:\\SYSTEM\\CurrentControlSet\\Control\\Session Manager\\Environment'\).Path -split ';' | Where-Object { $_ -match 'conda|forge|node' })
